---
name: Feature request
about: Propose an enhancement
labels: enhancement
---

## Problem Statement

What user or developer problem are you trying to solve?

## Proposed Solution

Describe the desired behavior.

## Alternatives Considered

What alternatives did you evaluate?

## Security / Privacy Impact

Could this change affect credential handling, data safety, or read-only guarantees?

## Testing Plan

How should this be validated?

## Additional Context

Any references, examples, or screenshots.
